findings.evidence_context: agents_list MCP tool override example shows the Freshservice query DSL syntax: "query (Freshservice query DSL, e.g. \"email:'user@example.com'\")" — RFC 2606 reserved domain used to demonstrate the email-attribute query format.

requesters_list MCP tool override example shows the Freshservice query DSL syntax: "query (Freshservice DSL, e.g. \"primary_email:'user@example.com'\")" — RFC 2606 reserved domain used to demonstrate the email-attribute query format.
